zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stanford esquire於大約1423年出生在英國貝德福爾時，他的父親John Stanford19歲，母親Penelope Bedfordshire19歲。他與Joan Boteler在英國英格蘭貝德福爾斯塔斯登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1476年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stanford esquire于大约1423年出生在英国貝德福爾时，他的父亲John Stanford19岁，母亲Penelope Bedfordshire19岁。他与Joan Boteler在英国英格兰貝德福爾斯塔斯登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1476年在英国英格兰貝德福爾享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stanford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called, including Stanford (Bedfordshire, Kent), Stanford Dingley and Stanford in the Vale (Berkshire), Stanford le Hope and Stanford Rivers (Essex), Stanford Bishop and Stanford Regis (Herefordshire), Stanford on Avon (Northamptonshire), Stanford on Soar (Nottinghamshire), and Stanford on Teme (Worcestershire); also from Stamford (Lincolnshire, Northumberland), Stamford Bridge (East Yorkshire), and Standford in Headley (Hampshire), all of which appear as Stanford in medieval documents. The placenames all derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ford ‘ford’. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 16th century, where it is also found under the variant Stankard.

History: An early bearer of this surname in North America, Thomas Stanford of England, settled in Charlestown, MA, in the mid 17th century and started a family line that includes Leland Stanford (1824–93), the railroad developer who was governor of CA, a US senator, and the founding benefactor of Stanford University.

variants.name: Stanforth
meanings: mainly a variant of   Stanford  , which may have migrated to North Yorkshire and Northumberland from Norfolk and Suffolk by the North Sea coastal trade.

variants.name: Standford
meanings: English: variant, with intrusive -d-, of   Stanford  . Compare   Standiford  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Stanford esquire was born about 1423, in Bedfordshire, England, his father, John Stanford, was 19 and his mother, Penelope Bedfordshire, was 19. He married Joan Boteler in Stagsden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1476, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stanford esquire est né environ 1423, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Stanford, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Penelope Bedfordshire, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joan Boteler à Stagsden, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1476, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stanford esquire um 1423 in Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Stanford 19 und seine Mutter Penelope Bedfordshire 19. Er hat in Stagsden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1476 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stanford esquire è nato il circa 1423 nel Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, John Stanford, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Penelope Bedfordshire, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Joan Boteler nel Stagsden, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1476, nel Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stanford esquireが約1423年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Stanfordは19歳，母Penelope Bedfordshireは19歳であった。イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスタグスデンでJoan Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1476年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stanford esquire(이)가 대략 1423년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Stanford(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Penelope Bedfordshire(은)는 19세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스타그즈든에서 Joan Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stanford esquire родился около 1423 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Stanford было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Penelope Bedfordshire, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Boteler в местности стагсден, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1476 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.
